title: Pizza Hunger Bar
description: Do you like pizza? I do, so i made this!
body:
This resource pack replaces the drumsticks from the original hunger bar with pizza! I liked pizza, and i wasn't satisfied with the hunger bar pack i was using. So i picked up an old version of Cosminterfaces from back where it was still called ReddyUI that had a pizza hunger bar, gave it the original MInecraft style, did some polishing and now, it's available for you to download!

Along with that, there's AppleSkin support! Not a lot to talk about it, but it's nice.

I hope you like it :D
